mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD (BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, WRITER, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO > 0 ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND WRITER = #{writer}
UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
